blocks.text: Match preview: Nottinghamshire face Surrey in Quarter Final 3 (T20) on Wed, 15 Jul, 2026, 9:00 pm at Trent Bridge Nottingham. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Classic English seaming conditions when clouds cover; batting paradise in sunshine.
Overcast · High 27°C / Low 15°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 18 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
